data.title: China Retaliates Against US Chip Sanctions, Tightens Mineral Exports
data.description: China tightens control on critical minerals used in chip manufacturing in response to U.S. restrictions. Global semiconductor landscape could be reshaped.

data.title: Okta Q3 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Strong Guidance, Shares Surge
data.description: Okta reported third-quarter revenue of $665 million, beating analyst estimates of $649.7 million.

data.title: Pure Storage Shares Soar After Strong Q3, Q4 Guidance Above Estimates: Details
data.description: Pure Storage reported its third-quarter results after Tuesday's closing bell. Here's a look at the details from the report.

data.title: Salesforce Q3 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Miss, Free Cash Flow Up 30%, AI Driving 'Groundbreaking Transformation' And More
data.description: Salesforce reported third-quarter revenue of $9.44 billion, beating the consensus estimate of $9.35 billion.

data.title: Marvell Technology Stock Climbs After Better-Than-Expected Q3 Results, Strong Q4 Guidance
data.description: Marvell Technology reported its third-quarter results after Tuesday's closing bell. Here's a look at the key figures from the quarter.
